headline: Bernstein upgrades CVS and Cigna, citing PBM reform as key clearing event
summary: Investing.com -- Bernstein upgraded both Cigna Group and CVS Health Corp to Outperform in separate notes on Thursday, arguing that sweeping pharmacy benefit manager (PBM) reforms have removed a major overhang for the sector.

headline: Bernstein Upgrades Cigna Group to Outperform, Raises Price Target to $358
summary: Bernstein  analyst Lance Wilkes   upgrades Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) from Market Perform to Outperform and raises the price target from $307 to $358.
